runners.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 300m. Last start finished 6th over 300m at this track beaten 6 lengths (17.61) behind West On Miley in a Free For All on April 9. Has run blistering time here with a 17.08 PB at the distance. Hard to beat.
